CREATE PROCEDURE test_describe_images_boundary() BEGIN DECLARE access_key, sec_token VARCHAR; DECLARE images, image_item ANY; SET access_key = 'AKIAEXAMPLEKEY1'; SET sec_token = 'EXAMPLESECRETKEY1'; SET images = xtree_doc(DB.DBA.AMAZON_DESCRIBE_IMAGES(access_key, sec_token)); SET image_item = xpath_eval('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item', images, 0); END;

CREATE PROCEDURE test_describe_images_empty() BEGIN DECLARE access_key, sec_token VARCHAR; DECLARE images, image_item ANY; SET access_key = ''; SET sec_token = ''; SET images = xtree_doc(DB.DBA.AMAZON_DESCRIBE_IMAGES(access_key, sec_token)); SET image_item = xpath_eval('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item', images, 0); END;

CREATE TABLE test_images (image_id VARCHAR(255), image_name VARCHAR(255), image_status VARCHAR(255)); INSERT INTO test_images VALUES ('ami-123456', 'My First AMI', 'available'), ('ami-789012', 'My Second AMI', 'pending'); CREATE PROCEDURE test_describe_images_join() BEGIN DECLARE access_key, sec_token VARCHAR; DECLARE images, image_item ANY; SET access_key = 'AKIAEXAMPLEKEY2'; SET sec_token = 'EXAMPLESECRETKEY2'; SET images = xtree_doc(DB.DBA.AMAZON_DESCRIBE_IMAGES(access_key, sec_token)); SET image_item = xpath_eval('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item', images, 0); SELECT ti.image_name, ti.image_status FROM test_images ti JOIN xpath_eval('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item', images) AS img ON ti.image_id = img/imageId; END;

CREATE PROCEDURE test_describe_images_nested() BEGIN DECLARE access_key, sec_token VARCHAR; DECLARE images, image_item ANY; SET access_key = 'AKIAEXAMPLEKEY3'; SET sec_token = 'EXAMPLESECRETKEY3'; SET images = xtree_doc(DB.DBA.AMAZON_DESCRIBE_IMAGES(access_key, sec_token)); SET image_item = xpath_eval('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item', images, 0); SELECT * FROM xmltable('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item' PASSING images COLUMNS image_id VARCHAR(255) PATH 'imageId', image_name VARCHAR(255) PATH 'imageName') AS img; END;

CREATE PROCEDURE test_describe_images_permission() BEGIN DECLARE access_key, sec_token VARCHAR; DECLARE images, image_item ANY; SET access_key = 'AKIAEXAMPLEKEY4'; SET sec_token = 'EXAMPLESECRETKEY4'; SET images = xtree_doc(DB.DBA.AMAZON_DESCRIBE_IMAGES(access_key, sec_token)); IF xpath_exists('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item/imageOwnerId[text() = "my_account_id"]', images) THEN SET image_item = xpath_eval('/DescribeImagesResponse/imagesSet/item', images, 0); END IF; END;
